summary: Well‑balanced audience recording with crisp highs and rich lows, offering a crowd mix that may even outshine some board tapes.
review: Reviewers commend this tape as the definitive audience source, noting its clear high end, deep low end, and an excellent blend of crowd noise. No specific musical moments or song performances are mentioned, so the strength lies primarily in the audio capture rather than show highlights.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rating review (3 stars) focusing on recording quality; no information about performance makes rating tentative.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear high‑frequency detail, rich low‑end response, and a well‑balanced crowd mix; reviewer suggests it could be better than some board recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on the performance or set structure were provided.
